title: ClearedJobs.Net Scraper
description: Extract security-cleared job listings from ClearedJobs.net. Search by keywords, location, and other filters.

startUrl.title: Search URL
startUrl.description: Custom search URL. If empty, will use filters below.

location.title: Location (City, State, ZIP)
location.description: Search location or leave empty for all.

results_wanted.title: Maximum Results
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of jobs to collect.

max_pages.title: Maximum Pages
max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to visit.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for scraping. Recommended: Residential proxies.
